commit.message:
feat: on-chain DOOM engine — full game with renderer, AI, and WASM browser playback

Pure Rust DOOM-style FPS engine designed for Substrate on-chain execution.
Every game tick runs deterministically using fixed-point math, with the
complete raycasting renderer producing 320x200 RGBA frames.

Engine features:
- DDA raycasting with textured walls, perspective-correct floors/ceilings
- Two-pass renderer (floor/ceiling first, walls on top) eliminating gaps
- 3 enemy types with 8-directional sprites, LOS-based AI, pain chance
- 3 weapons (fist, pistol, shotgun) with hitscan and bullet puff effects
- Door system with auto-close and player-safe re-open
- 26 decorative prop types from Freedoom WAD assets
- Sector-based lighting with flicker, pulse, and strobe effects
- Authentic STBAR with STTNUM digits and yellow ammo inventory
- 34 tests covering all game systems

WASM bridge with zero-copy framebuffer for 60fps browser playback.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat(api): promotion model + schema + repository + migration (CAB-1706 W1) (#1573)

## Summary
- Add `Promotion` SQLAlchemy model with chain validation
(dev→staging→production only)
- Add Pydantic v2 schemas: `PromotionCreate`, `PromotionResponse`,
`PromotionListResponse`, `PromotionRollbackRequest`,
`PromotionDiffResponse`
- Add `PromotionRepository` with async CRUD, filtered listing,
active-for-target check, latest-promoted lookup
- Add Alembic migration 062 with partial unique index preventing
concurrent promotions
- 22 unit tests covering chain validation, model, schemas, and
repository

## Test plan
- [x] 22/22 tests pass (`pytest tests/test_promotion_model.py`)
- [x] ruff + black clean
- [ ] CI green (3 required checks)

commit.message:
Fix Sanity image loading: switch useCdn to true

With useCdn: false, all Sanity queries go through api.sanity.io which
requires CORS. useCdn: true uses cdn.sanity.io which works for public
datasets without CORS configuration, fixing images not loading on Vercel.

commit.message:
fix: identity/commitment mismatch causing 'leaf not in tree' error

submitCommitment was signing twice: once for the commitment sent to the
API, and again via createIdentity() which re-signed and stored a
different identity in localStorage. Since wallet signatures are
non-deterministic, the stored identity didn't match the commitment.

Now stores the identity from the same signature used for the commitment,
ensuring the proof's leaf always exists in the Merkle tree.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(mcp-server): fix auto-init crash and add Smithery CI automation

The stateless HTTP transport only allows one request per instance,
causing Worker crashes (Error 1101) when Smithery scanned tools/list.
Use session-scoped transport for the auto-init sequence with proper
mcp-session-id forwarding and SSE stream draining.

Also update VERSION to 0.1.2, add intent/contract tools to README,
and automate Smithery publish in CI pipeline.

commit.message:
[CODE+DATA+DOC] CO_EmptySpace DAO + DX BOM restructure — generic BOM traversal

CO_EmptySpace UNIT BOM lookup now uses MBOM.getByBomIdPrefix("WT_") DAO
pattern (same as PlaceBomVerb, EnBlocVerb, WalkThruVerb). No hardcoded
bom_category values. L2 room fallback via MBOM.getByType("FLOOR") for
SH structured floor BOM.

DX WT_DX restructured: FLOOR_DX_L1_STD and FLOOR_DX_L2_STD deactivated
as direct UNIT children — room content belongs inside half-units, not at
UNIT level. Shared structural (slabs, roof) + DUPLEX_SET_STD remain.
Generic BOM traversal produces L0 + structural L1, zero L2 for DX.
No building-type checks in code — abstract tack model handles it.

CoEmptySpaceTest 8/8 GREEN. W-CO_EMPTY-2 fixed (WT_SH prefix).
W-CO_EMPTY-6 updated: DX L0-only model (no L2 room lines).

Phase F0.0 DONE. F0.1a added: full DAO Model refactor (X_ → getter/setter).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
T-344: Fix BSD sed -i compatibility in init.sh

macOS BSD sed requires -i '' (empty backup extension) while GNU sed
uses -i alone. The settings.json placeholder substitution used GNU
syntax, causing 'extra characters at the end of d command' on macOS.
Detect GNU vs BSD at runtime and use correct syntax.

L-081: BSD vs GNU sed -i portability pattern.

commit.message:
Add seasons, food storage gene, reproduction limits, and seasonal analytics

Introduces a cyclical season system (spring/summer/autumn/winter) that creates
meaningful survival pressure. Entities now have a 16th DNA gene for food storage
capacity, females are limited to one birth per season, and food respawn freezes
during winter. Storage-to-energy conversion uses a lossy metabolic efficiency
model tied to the energyEfficiency gene.

commit.message:
fix(cli): replace `member${i}` index-based naming fallback with diagnostic error (#205)

## Why

Inline object union members without a deterministic name source
(`__typename`/`$typeName`, `inlineObjectHintName`) fell back to
`member${i}` index-based naming. This produced fragile, meaningless
names that shifted when members were inserted, without informing users
of the need to restructure their types.

## Summary

- Add `UNNAMEABLE_UNION_MEMBER` diagnostic code to `DiagnosticCode`
union
- Replace `member${i}` fallback in `resolveMemberNames` with an error
diagnostic and `continue` to skip the member
- Remove `member${i}` from `generatedFrom` context path (now safely uses
`!` assertion since `continue` excludes the null case)
- Improve anonymous member label in `typename-validator.ts` from
`member${i}` to `(anonymous member at index ${i})`
- Update `inline-union-ordering` golden test to reflect new diagnostic
errors

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

---------

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix: add encoder warmup + K-means codebook init to fix codebook collapse

Root cause: CW (effective codebook) and z (encoder output) start in misaligned
regions of 128-dim space. 4096 random entries are too sparse — only ~17 codes
near any encoder outputs. Training collapses this to 1 code.

Fix:
- Encoder warmup: 10 epochs recon-only training to learn good z representations
- K-means init: at end of warmup, cluster z → set C = W^T(centroids) so CW ≈ centroids
- Dead code revival: now properly sets C[dead] = W^T(z) instead of C[dead] = z
- SimVQCodebook.init_from_z(): new method for CW-aligned initialization

commit.message:
fix: topup 请求只发送失效账号的探测报告

问题：
- Go 版本发送了所有探测结果到 topup API
- Bash 版本只发送失效账号（401/429）的探测报告

修复：
- 过滤探测结果，只包含 401 和 429 状态码的报告
- 添加 debug 日志显示 account_ids 和 invalid_reports 数量
- 与 Bash 版本逻辑保持一致

影响：
- 减少请求体大小
- 与服务器预期的数据格式一致
- 可能提高服务器返回账号的准确性

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
